projects.title: ULAA-Net: Unsupervised Organ Anomaly Detection
projects.description: Developed an unsupervised anomlay detection model for organ-specific medical imaging.
projects.longDescription: A medical anomaly detection model utilising deep learning models trained on medical imaging data. The system assists healthcare professionals in identifying potential health issues early, improving patient outcomes through timely intervention.

projects.title: Arbor: Financial Adviser Bot
projects.description: Built a full-stack financial adviser bot platform to improve financial literacy with real-time market data visualization, AI-powered insights, and financial learning features.
projects.longDescription: A financial dashboard that aims to integrate AI and seemless UI/UX to improve financial literacy. It provides users with personalized financial advice, expense tracking, and investment insights using advanced LLM technology.

projects.title: Nota: AI-Powered Note-taking App
projects.description: Created a Markdown-base note taking app that integrate AI for review/quizing based on the users notes.
projects.longDescription: An app geared towards improving the efficiency of note-taking by utlising modern technologies like Markdown and AI. It features smart tagging, AI-generated summaries, and a spaced-repetition quizzing system.

projects.title: EchoPhoto Branding & UI
projects.description: A comprehensive branding and web design project for a premium photography studio.
projects.longDescription: Designed a minimalist yet impactful brand identity for EchoPhoto. The project involved redesigning and developing EchoPhoto's e-commerce website on Shopify, creating a cohesive visual identity across all platforms, and enhancing the user experience to reflect the brand's premium positioning in the photography industry.

projects.title: Order of Otakus: Community Hub
projects.description: Designed and developed a community platform for anime and manga enthusiasts.
projects.longDescription: A vibrant online community hub for anime and manga fans, featuring a dynamic design that captures the essence of otaku culture. The project included branding, UI/UX design, and a functional prototype showcasing user profiles, blog posts of admin memembers.

projects.title: GDSC UoL: Portfolio Showcase
projects.description: Graphic design and branding materials for GDSC UoL events.
projects.longDescription: A collection of social media graphics, posters, and presentation slides designed for the Google Developer Student Club at the University of London. The designs follow Google's brand guidelines while adding a unique community flair.

projects.title: MGC: Marketing Graphics
projects.description: Marketing and social media content for MGC initiatives.
projects.longDescription: Developed a series of marketing materials, including Instagram posts, banners, and event presentations. The designs were created to promote MGC's events and initiatives, focusing on vibrant visuals and clear messaging to engage the target audience effectively.

projects.title: Urban Photography Collection
projects.description: A collection of street and urban photography exploring the beauty of everyday cityscapes.
projects.longDescription: Explored the intersection of geometry and urban life. This series captures the often-overlooked beauty in industrial structures, street scenes, and the play of shadows in modern cityscapes.
